title: Analyzing Machine Learning Models for Credit Scoring with Explainable AI and Optimizing Investment Decisions

notes: This paper examines two different yet related questions related to explainable AI (XAI) practices. Machine learning (ML) is increasingly important in financial services, such as pre-approval, credit underwriting, investments, and various front-end and back-end activities. Machine...
